scripts.dev:apis: concurrently -n orch,rt,br,sk -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/orchestrator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/realtime" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/browser-operator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/skills-registry"
scripts.smoke:services: concurrently -n orch,rt,br,sk,probe -c blue,magenta,yellow,green,cyan "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/orchestrator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/realtime" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/browser-operator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/skills-registry" "node scripts/wait-apis.mjs"
scripts.smoke:stack: concurrently -n orch,rt,br,sk,probe,web -c blue,magenta,yellow,green,cyan,white "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/orchestrator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/realtime" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/browser-operator" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/skills-registry" "node scripts/wait-apis.mjs" "npm run dev -w @manus-plus/web"
scripts.ci:integration: concurrently --kill-others -s first -n apis,check "npm run dev:apis" "node scripts/wait-apis.mjs && npm run verify:health && npm run e2e:smoke"
